name: CSX Corporation
analysis: CSX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $46.3109. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
